title: Toji was in storyboards for EoE Whats the context
display_title: Toji was in storyboards for EoE Whats the context
wikitext:
[]: Toji was in storyboards for EoE? What's the context?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 30, 2006 9:36 pm http://eva.netroof.net/faq/faqansw.php?mode=eng&t=904#q904eng I read here that Toji was playing basketball in a wheelchair in original storyboards for EoE. What's the context for the situation? Is it possible to find images anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Dec 30, 2006 9:47 pm It was a farewell flashback. Give me no credit for this pic it's Reichu's.

[]: Re: Toji was in storyboards for EoE? What's the context?             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 30, 2006 9:52 pm NAveryW wrote: http://eva.netroof.net/faq/faqansw.php?mode=eng&t=904#q904eng I read here that Toji was playing basketball in a wheelchair in original storyboards for EoE. What's the context for the situation? Is it possible to find images anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 30, 2006 9:53 pm It just didn't fit the tone of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 30, 2006 10:10 pm Huh, is there a translation of this scene, and are there others of the type that didn't make it? Also, where did the scene take place?

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sun Dec 31, 2006 7:14 pm i thought they amputated one of Toji's arms

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 31, 2006 7:39 pm InvaderRen wrote: i thought they amputated one of Toji's arms

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 31, 2006 8:43 pm I dug up a translation of the scene by Bochan Bird. Enjoy. Missing End of Evangelion Sequence I have attached the translation to a "missing" Eva movie scene found in the Story Board Collection (SBC) in the limited edition LD/VHS movie collector's box set. According to the SBC sequence, this scene comes just after Shinji's masturbation scene in Asuka's hospital room, and it carries some sinister implications if you read between the lines... Bochan_bird ======================================= Basketball Court" scene (Movie SBC) translation ======================================= Notes: - Cuts are comprised of one or more storyboard frames, indicated by "-". - Production and editing notes are translated as is. PAGE 506 Cut 31 Sound: (Jet noise in background, also some helicopter noise) Description/Notes: [Evening] - Transport jets fly overhead, leaving contrails in the sky. Slight wavy, dreamlike look. Cut 32 Sound: (Jet noise continues) Description/Notes: - Chained Junior High School gate -- sign says "Closed". Gate is chained and locked with a padlock. Cut 33 Sound: (Faint basketball dribbling sound)Description/Notes: - Classroom interior strewn with rubble from Eva-00 explosion. Evening sun's rays reflect/sparkle off scattered glass shards. Cut 34 Sound: (Basketball dribbling sound gradually becomes louder) Creaking/mechanical sound also heard Description/Notes: - School basketball court. All windows facing the court are broken, giving the appearance of an abandoned building. Sunlight reflects off remaining glass. - Close-up shot of basketball bouncing. Pan following basketball to close-up of Touji's wheelchair. * Touji is dribbling so basketball should not be so far from wheelchair as shown in frame. (Please take care of that.) - Pan out at end of cut. Wheelchair does slight wheely. PAGE 507 Cut 34 (cont.) Description/Notes: - Shot of basketball court from over hoop. - Basketball passes in/out of frame through hoop. Cut 35 Sound: (Dribbling sound) Description/Notes: - Looking at opposite hoop through basket net. Shinji (leaning back against chain-link fence) Kensuke (filming transport jets overhead) * Want to cut Touji and wheelchair from this frame, so layout is difficult. Why? Sound: (Basketball banging against rim) - Ball passes in/out of frame -- Ball bangs against rim and falls through net. (Pan down?) - Sitting Shinji/Filming Kensuke Cut 36 Sound: (Dribbling sound in background draws closer) Kensuke: Class Rep and the others left on this morning's flight. Shinji: ...... Description/Notes: - View of Shinji's back through fence. (Touji is hidden behind Shinji) (Touji's presence felt only through dribbling sound.) Kensuke keeps filming -- jet noise in the background. PAGE 508 Cut 37 Sound: Touji: I don't know why, but we're all going to Germany. Kensuke (not taking eye from camera): That's right -- tomorrow. It doesn't seem to be an evacuation, though... Description/Notes: - Distant shot Sunlight sparkles off glass shards. Severely damaged school building -- Debris scattered over court. Touji dribbles slowly and prepares to shoot at end of cut. Cut 38 Sound: Touji: So, I just wanted to say- Description/Notes: - View from behind Shinji, Touji aims while speaking and, Sound: Touji: Thanks! (speaks/shoots basketball at same time) - Touji shoots. Sound: (Basketball swishing through net and bouncing) - Basketball rebounds to Touji's hand in time with dialog. Touji looks up at Shinji. Cut 39 Sound: Touji: And I really mean it, Shinji. Thanks. Shinji: ...... Kensuke: See you later, Ikari. You take care. Shinji: ...... Description/Notes: - Distant shot -- long, drawn-out pause. - (as if to cheer Shinji up) Touji passes the basketball to Shinji without saying anything, but Shinji drops the ball. PAGE 509 Cut 40 Sound: (Ball bouncing sound growing fainter) Description/Notes: - Shinji's hands remain where he failed to catch the basketball. - Shinji's hands quiver/convulse slightly. Cut 41 Sound: (Jet noise) Description/Notes: - Shinji's view. The basketball rolls away slowly. No one else is in the court. Pan up (mid-cut) to jet contrails in the sky (stop). -Fin.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Sun Dec 31, 2006 8:46 pm Had that scene not been cut, I would've been heavily convinced that Touji, Kensuke, Hikari, et al . had become the pilots for the MP Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 31, 2006 9:12 pm Eh? Sinister implications? What does th- OH. Oh God. I think I got it. If I'm right, then jeez, that really is sinister. But just in case, what is it that Bochan is implying? EDIT: Oh, and also, Shinji had already said that Kensuke and Toji had left at the beginning of episode 24. I take it this was meant to be a flashback, then? But Shinji wasn't that extremely depressed until after he killed Kaworu... 'NOTHER EDIT: Also, it specifically states that Toji shouldn't be shown for most of the scene; even most of his spoken lines, you just hear him and he's hidden from view. Any ideas why?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 31, 2006 9:26 pm Alas, the "sinster implications" went over my head. Can anyone tell me? Also, were there any other scenes that didn't quite make it/were scrapped? - Shinji's hands quiver/convulse slightly.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 31, 2006 9:36 pm Well, as for the sinister aspect I can only think that since they're going to Germany, SEELE has something "special" planned for them. I'm pretty sure they're serious about thanking Shinji. I mean, come on, though he's not quite heroic now, he saved the world quite a few times before.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 31, 2006 9:38 pm :shock: ....Holy...Shit... That's, um, creepy... I wouldn't put it past those bastards to do something like that either; I wondered what the fate of those three in EoE was.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Dec 31, 2006 9:43 pm They tend to put female souls in Evas so Toji and Kensuke are probably safe, their female class mates on the other hand.....

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 31, 2006 9:47 pm Well, since the MPEs used Kaworu Dummy Plugs, that would mean that the Evas could do what they truly wanted to (as Yui did when the Dummy Plug was activated inside her), and I doubt that the ol' class rep wanted to disembowel and eat Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Sun Dec 31, 2006 11:02 pm NAveryW wrote: Well, since the MPEs used Kaworu Dummy Plugs, that would mean that the Evas could do what they truly wanted to (as Yui did when the Dummy Plug was activated inside her), and I doubt that the ol' class rep wanted to disembowel and eat Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 31, 2006 11:40 pm Oh, wait, never mind... the Dummy Plug was 18, Angel munchies was 19. Sorry. >.<

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 01, 2007 6:09 am Jeez, I thought Last B was bad enough, but this? Me thinks I'm gonna start having nightmares about what SEELE would do with killing them... One thing that puzzles me is why would they want to do anything to those 3 to begin with? Touji I could kinda see, as he's the Fourth Children and all, but Hikari and Kensuke?? :? Just because they know Shinji and Asuka (and Rei, but she's not buddies with the classmates, soo...)?? I know! Kensuke somehow found out the Truth (about Third Impact) so they wanted to ice him Kaji-style to prevent such things from leaking out! It's funny...when I first read the line about "We're going to Germany", I instantly thought, They're gonna stick around so they can harass Asuka if she ever visits there?? :mrgreen: 'NOTHER EDIT: Also, it specifically states that Toji shouldn't be shown for most of the scene; even most of his spoken lines, you just hear him and he's hidden from view. Any ideas why?

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Mon Jan 01, 2007 8:12 am Not seeing Toji would be artistic liscence. By not seeing him yourselves, it's implied that Shinji doesn't see him either. In other words, he doesn't want to see what he did. The question arises as to what Toji is thanking Shinji for, or whether it's sarcastic (or if Toji means well but Shinji takes it wrongly). I'd also be interested as t whether Toji expected Shinji to catch the ball and play with him, or if he actually threw it at him aggresively, pissed off by his detachment, and ditches him. In addition, any ideas as to where I might be able to find storyboards (scanned?). I'd be very interested.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 01, 2007 10:05 am http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/gekijouban-econteshuu_506.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/gekijouban-econteshuu_507.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/gekijouban-econteshuu_508.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/gekijouban-econteshuu_509.jpg Digital photos (!) I took a while back. Not the best, but better than nothing.
